description: One-tap reorder (Feature 5), Order scheduling customer UI (Feature 8), Delivery tip (Feature 9), and Structured delivery instructions (Feature 16). These are all checkout/order flow improvements.
steps: Create apps/web/components/dashboard/reorder-button.tsx: A 'Reorder' button component that takes order items array, validates stock availability via API call, and adds all available items to cart using the cart provider's addItems method. Shows a toast for any out-of-stock items that were skipped. Use Framer Motion for button press animation.

Update the CustomerOrdersClient component (apps/web/components/dashboard/customer-orders-client.tsx): Add the ReorderButton to each DELIVERED order card. Also add a 'Buy Again' section at the top showing frequently ordered products (from completed orders).

Create apps/web/app/api/orders/reorder/route.ts: POST endpoint that accepts an orderId, looks up the order items, checks current stock for each product, and returns { available: Product[], unavailable: string[] }.

Update apps/web/components/checkout/delivery-mode-selector.tsx: Enhance the existing component to show slot selection in a more Swiggy-like UI with date tabs (Today, Tomorrow) and time slot cards. Fetch slots from /api/delivery-slots. Show remaining capacity per slot. Add visual calendar-like presentation.

Create apps/web/components/checkout/tip-selector.tsx: Quick-select tip amounts (Rs 20, 30, 50, Custom) with tap-to-select UI. Shows rider emoji and 'Thank your rider' text. Selected tip adds to order total. Custom tip uses a number input. Framer Motion for selection animation.

Create apps/web/components/checkout/delivery-instructions.tsx: Quick-select chips for common delivery instructions ('Ring bell', 'Leave at door', 'Call before delivery', 'Do not ring bell - baby sleeping'). Plus a free-text field below for custom instructions. Saves structured data.

Update apps/web/components/checkout-form.tsx: Integrate TipSelector and DeliveryInstructions components into the checkout flow. Add tip to order total calculation. Pass deliveryInstructions to the order creation API.
Update apps/web/app/api/orders/route.ts: Handle tipAmount and deliveryInstructions fields from the checkout payload. Store them in the Order record.
acceptance_criteria: Reorder button on delivered orders adds items to cart
Reorder API checks stock availability and returns results
Delivery slot selection shows date tabs and time slot cards
Tip selector shows quick amounts with visual feedback
Delivery instructions shows chips and free text
Checkout form integrates tip and instructions
Order API stores tip and delivery instructions
verification: cd apps/web && npx next build 2>&1 | tail -20
